subtitle.en: Lahiri, Raman, KP, Fagan-Bradley  –  why they differ, how to choose, and numerical comparison
subtitle.hi: लाहिरी, रमण, केपी, फगन-ब्रैडली  –  अन्तर क्यों, कैसे चुनें, और संख्यात्मक तुलना

question.en: Which star does the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha use as its reference anchor?
question.hi: लाहिरी (चित्रापक्ष) अयनांश किस तारे को संदर्भ बिन्दु मानता है?
question.ta: Which star does the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha use as its reference anchor?
question.te: Which star does the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha use as its reference anchor?
question.bn: Which star does the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha use as its reference anchor?
question.kn: Which star does the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha use as its reference anchor?
question.mr: लाहिरी (चित्रापक्ष) अयनांश किस तारे को संदर्भ बिन्दु मानता है?
question.gu: Which star does the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha use as its reference anchor?
question.mai: लाहिरी (चित्रपक्ष) अयनांश अपन संदर्भ बिंदुक रूप मे कोन ताराक उपयोग करैत अछि?

explanation.en: Lahiri defines Spica (Chitra, Alpha Virginis) at exactly 180° sidereal longitude  –  the start of Tula (Libra). This was adopted by the Indian Calendar Reform Committee in 1956.
explanation.hi: लाहिरी पद्धति स्पाइका (चित्रा, अल्फा वर्जिनिस) को 180° निरयन देशान्तर पर  –  तुला राशि के आरम्भ पर  –  निर्धारित करती है। इसे 1956 में भारतीय पञ्चाङ्ग सुधार समिति ने अपनाया।
explanation.ta: Lahiri defines Spica (Chitra, Alpha Virginis) at exactly 180° sidereal longitude  –  the start of Tula (Libra). This was adopted by the Indian Calendar Reform Committee in 1956.
explanation.te: Lahiri defines Spica (Chitra, Alpha Virginis) at exactly 180° sidereal longitude  –  the start of Tula (Libra). This was adopted by the Indian Calendar Reform Committee in 1956.
explanation.bn: Lahiri defines Spica (Chitra, Alpha Virginis) at exactly 180° sidereal longitude  –  the start of Tula (Libra). This was adopted by the Indian Calendar Reform Committee in 1956.
explanation.kn: Lahiri defines Spica (Chitra, Alpha Virginis) at exactly 180° sidereal longitude  –  the start of Tula (Libra). This was adopted by the Indian Calendar Reform Committee in 1956.
explanation.mr: लाहिरी पद्धति स्पाइका (चित्रा, अल्फा वर्जिनिस) को 180° निरयन देशान्तर पर  –  तुला राशि के आरम्भ पर  –  निर्धारित करती है। इसे 1956 में भारतीय पञ्चाङ्ग सुधार समिति ने अपनाया।
explanation.gu: Lahiri defines Spica (Chitra, Alpha Virginis) at exactly 180° sidereal longitude  –  the start of Tula (Libra). This was adopted by the Indian Calendar Reform Committee in 1956.
explanation.mai: लाहिरी ठीक १८०° निरयन देशांतर पर चित्रा (अल्फा वर्जिनिस) केँ परिभाषित करैत अछि – तुला (Libra) क प्रारंभ। ई १९५६ मे भारतीय पंचांग सुधार समिति द्वारा अपनाओल गेल छल।

question.en: The KP (Krishnamurti) ayanamsha differs from Lahiri by approximately 6 arcminutes.
question.hi: केपी (कृष्णमूर्ति) अयनांश लाहिरी से लगभग 6 कलांश (आर्कमिनट) भिन्न है।
question.ta: The KP (Krishnamurti) ayanamsha differs from Lahiri by approximately 6 arcminutes.
question.te: The KP (Krishnamurti) ayanamsha differs from Lahiri by approximately 6 arcminutes.
question.bn: The KP (Krishnamurti) ayanamsha differs from Lahiri by approximately 6 arcminutes.
question.kn: The KP (Krishnamurti) ayanamsha differs from Lahiri by approximately 6 arcminutes.
question.mr: केपी (कृष्णमूर्ति) अयनांश लाहिरी से लगभग 6 कलांश (आर्कमिनट) भिन्न है।
question.gu: The KP (Krishnamurti) ayanamsha differs from Lahiri by approximately 6 arcminutes.
question.mai: केपी (कृष्णमूर्ति) अयनांश लाहिरी सँ लगभग ६ आर्कमिनट भिन्न अछि।

explanation.en: Correct. The KP ayanamsha is very close to Lahiri  –  typically about 6 arcminutes (0.1°) less. This small difference rarely changes the sign of a planet, but can occasionally shift sub-lord allocations in KP astrology.
explanation.hi: सही। केपी अयनांश लाहिरी के बहुत निकट है  –  सामान्यतः लगभग 6 कलांश (0.1°) कम। यह छोटा अन्तर प्रायः ग्रह की राशि नहीं बदलता, पर कभी-कभी केपी ज्योतिष में उपनक्षत्र-स्वामी बदल सकता है।
explanation.ta: Correct. The KP ayanamsha is very close to Lahiri  –  typically about 6 arcminutes (0.1°) less. This small difference rarely changes the sign of a planet, but can occasionally shift sub-lord allocations in KP astrology.
explanation.te: Correct. The KP ayanamsha is very close to Lahiri  –  typically about 6 arcminutes (0.1°) less. This small difference rarely changes the sign of a planet, but can occasionally shift sub-lord allocations in KP astrology.
explanation.bn: Correct. The KP ayanamsha is very close to Lahiri  –  typically about 6 arcminutes (0.1°) less. This small difference rarely changes the sign of a planet, but can occasionally shift sub-lord allocations in KP astrology.
explanation.kn: Correct. The KP ayanamsha is very close to Lahiri  –  typically about 6 arcminutes (0.1°) less. This small difference rarely changes the sign of a planet, but can occasionally shift sub-lord allocations in KP astrology.
explanation.mr: सही। केपी अयनांश लाहिरी के बहुत निकट है  –  सामान्यतः लगभग 6 कलांश (0.1°) कम। यह छोटा अन्तर प्रायः ग्रह की राशि नहीं बदलता, पर कभी-कभी केपी ज्योतिष में उपनक्षत्र-स्वामी बदल सकता है।
explanation.gu: Correct. The KP ayanamsha is very close to Lahiri  –  typically about 6 arcminutes (0.1°) less. This small difference rarely changes the sign of a planet, but can occasionally shift sub-lord allocations in KP astrology.
explanation.mai: सही अछि। केपी अयनांश लाहिरीक बहुत निकट अछि – सामान्यतः लगभग ६ आर्कमिनट (०.१°) कम। ई छोट अंतर शायद ही कहियो कोनो ग्रहक राशि बदलैत अछि, मुदा कहियो काल केपी ज्योतिष मे उप-स्वामीक आवंटन केँ स्थानांतरित क' सकैत अछि।

question.en: The Fagan-Bradley ayanamsha is primarily used in which tradition?
question.hi: फगन-ब्रैडली अयनांश मुख्यतः किस परम्परा में प्रयुक्त होता है?
question.ta: The Fagan-Bradley ayanamsha is primarily used in which tradition?
question.te: The Fagan-Bradley ayanamsha is primarily used in which tradition?
question.bn: The Fagan-Bradley ayanamsha is primarily used in which tradition?
question.kn: The Fagan-Bradley ayanamsha is primarily used in which tradition?
question.mr: फगन-ब्रैडली अयनांश मुख्यतः किस परम्परा में प्रयुक्त होता है?
question.gu: The Fagan-Bradley ayanamsha is primarily used in which tradition?
question.mai: फेगन-ब्रैडली अयनांश मुख्य रूप सँ कोन परंपरा मे उपयोग कएल जाइत अछि?

explanation.en: Fagan-Bradley is the standard ayanamsha for Western Sidereal astrology, developed by Cyril Fagan and Donald Bradley in the mid-20th century. It anchors Aldebaran (Rohini) near 15° Taurus and Antares near 15° Scorpio.
explanation.hi: फगन-ब्रैडली पाश्चात्य निरयन ज्योतिष का मानक अयनांश है, जिसे सिरिल फगन और डोनाल्ड ब्रैडली ने बीसवीं शताब्दी के मध्य में विकसित किया। यह ऐल्डेबरान (रोहिणी) को वृषभ 15° के निकट और ऐन्टेयर्स को वृश्चिक 15° के निकट स्थिर करता है।
explanation.ta: Fagan-Bradley is the standard ayanamsha for Western Sidereal astrology, developed by Cyril Fagan and Donald Bradley in the mid-20th century. It anchors Aldebaran (Rohini) near 15° Taurus and Antares near 15° Scorpio.
explanation.te: Fagan-Bradley is the standard ayanamsha for Western Sidereal astrology, developed by Cyril Fagan and Donald Bradley in the mid-20th century. It anchors Aldebaran (Rohini) near 15° Taurus and Antares near 15° Scorpio.
explanation.bn: Fagan-Bradley is the standard ayanamsha for Western Sidereal astrology, developed by Cyril Fagan and Donald Bradley in the mid-20th century. It anchors Aldebaran (Rohini) near 15° Taurus and Antares near 15° Scorpio.
explanation.kn: Fagan-Bradley is the standard ayanamsha for Western Sidereal astrology, developed by Cyril Fagan and Donald Bradley in the mid-20th century. It anchors Aldebaran (Rohini) near 15° Taurus and Antares near 15° Scorpio.
explanation.mr: फगन-ब्रैडली पाश्चात्य निरयन ज्योतिष का मानक अयनांश है, जिसे सिरिल फगन और डोनाल्ड ब्रैडली ने बीसवीं शताब्दी के मध्य में विकसित किया। यह ऐल्डेबरान (रोहिणी) को वृषभ 15° के निकट और ऐन्टेयर्स को वृश्चिक 15° के निकट स्थिर करता है।
explanation.gu: Fagan-Bradley is the standard ayanamsha for Western Sidereal astrology, developed by Cyril Fagan and Donald Bradley in the mid-20th century. It anchors Aldebaran (Rohini) near 15° Taurus and Antares near 15° Scorpio.
explanation.mai: फेगन-ब्रैडली पश्चिमी निरयन ज्योतिषक लेल मानक अयनांश अछि, जे साइरिल फेगन आ डोनाल्ड ब्रैडली द्वारा २०म शताब्दीक मध्य मे विकसित कएल गेल छल। ई रोहिणी (Aldebaran) केँ १५° वृषभक लग आ ज्येष्ठा (Antares) केँ १५° वृश्चिकक लग एंकर करैत अछि।

question.en: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha for J2000.0 is approximately:
question.hi: J2000.0 के लिए बी.वी. रमण अयनांश लगभग कितना है?
question.ta: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha for J2000.0 is approximately:
question.te: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha for J2000.0 is approximately:
question.bn: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha for J2000.0 is approximately:
question.kn: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha for J2000.0 is approximately:
question.mr: J2000.0 के लिए बी.वी. रमण अयनांश लगभग कितना है?
question.gu: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha for J2000.0 is approximately:
question.mai: J2000.0 क लेल बी.वी. रमन अयनांश लगभग अछि:

explanation.en: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha is approximately 22.37° at J2000.0  –  about 1.5° less than Lahiri. This places the zero-ayanamsha year around 397 CE rather than Lahiri's ~285 CE.
explanation.hi: बी.वी. रमण अयनांश J2000.0 पर लगभग 22.37° है  –  लाहिरी से लगभग 1.5° कम। इससे शून्य-अयनांश वर्ष लाहिरी के ~285 ई. की बजाय लगभग 397 ई. में आता है।
explanation.ta: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha is approximately 22.37° at J2000.0  –  about 1.5° less than Lahiri. This places the zero-ayanamsha year around 397 CE rather than Lahiri's ~285 CE.
explanation.te: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha is approximately 22.37° at J2000.0  –  about 1.5° less than Lahiri. This places the zero-ayanamsha year around 397 CE rather than Lahiri's ~285 CE.
explanation.bn: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha is approximately 22.37° at J2000.0  –  about 1.5° less than Lahiri. This places the zero-ayanamsha year around 397 CE rather than Lahiri's ~285 CE.
explanation.kn: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha is approximately 22.37° at J2000.0  –  about 1.5° less than Lahiri. This places the zero-ayanamsha year around 397 CE rather than Lahiri's ~285 CE.
explanation.mr: बी.वी. रमण अयनांश J2000.0 पर लगभग 22.37° है  –  लाहिरी से लगभग 1.5° कम। इससे शून्य-अयनांश वर्ष लाहिरी के ~285 ई. की बजाय लगभग 397 ई. में आता है।
explanation.gu: The B.V. Raman ayanamsha is approximately 22.37° at J2000.0  –  about 1.5° less than Lahiri. This places the zero-ayanamsha year around 397 CE rather than Lahiri's ~285 CE.
explanation.mai: बी.वी. रमन अयनांश J2000.0 पर लगभग २२.३७° अछि – लाहिरी सँ लगभग १.५° कम। ई शून्य-अयनांश वर्ष केँ लाहिरीक ~२८५ ईस्वी क बदला मे लगभग ३९७ ईस्वीक लग रखैत अछि।

question.en: All ayanamsha systems agree on the rate of precession (~50.3 arcsec/year)  –  they only disagree on the zero-point epoch.
question.hi: सभी अयनांश पद्धतियाँ अयनगति दर (~50.3 कलासेकण्ड/वर्ष) पर सहमत हैं  –  वे केवल शून्य-बिन्दु युग पर असहमत हैं।
question.ta: All ayanamsha systems agree on the rate of precession (~50.3 arcsec/year)  –  they only disagree on the zero-point epoch.
question.te: All ayanamsha systems agree on the rate of precession (~50.3 arcsec/year)  –  they only disagree on the zero-point epoch.
question.bn: All ayanamsha systems agree on the rate of precession (~50.3 arcsec/year)  –  they only disagree on the zero-point epoch.
question.kn: All ayanamsha systems agree on the rate of precession (~50.3 arcsec/year)  –  they only disagree on the zero-point epoch.
question.mr: सभी अयनांश पद्धतियाँ अयनगति दर (~50.3 कलासेकण्ड/वर्ष) पर सहमत हैं  –  वे केवल शून्य-बिन्दु युग पर असहमत हैं।
question.gu: All ayanamsha systems agree on the rate of precession (~50.3 arcsec/year)  –  they only disagree on the zero-point epoch.
question.mai: सभ अयनांश प्रणाली अयनगति क दर (~५०.३ आर्कसेकंड/वर्ष) पर सहमत अछि – ओ सभ मात्र शून्य-बिंदु युग पर असहमत अछि।

explanation.en: Correct. All major ayanamsha systems use the same precession rate from modern astronomy. The difference lies in when they place the zero-ayanamsha epoch  –  the year when tropical and sidereal zodiacs were aligned. Lahiri: ~285 CE, Raman: ~397 CE, Fagan-Bradley: ~221 CE.
explanation.hi: सही। सभी प्रमुख अयनांश पद्धतियाँ आधुनिक खगोलविज्ञान की वही अयनगति दर प्रयोग करती हैं। अन्तर इसमें है कि वे शून्य-अयनांश युग  –  जब सायन और निरयन राशिचक्र समरेखित थे  –  कब मानती हैं। लाहिरी: ~285 ई., रमण: ~397 ई., फगन-ब्रैडली: ~221 ई.।
explanation.ta: Correct. All major ayanamsha systems use the same precession rate from modern astronomy. The difference lies in when they place the zero-ayanamsha epoch  –  the year when tropical and sidereal zodiacs were aligned. Lahiri: ~285 CE, Raman: ~397 CE, Fagan-Bradley: ~221 CE.
explanation.te: Correct. All major ayanamsha systems use the same precession rate from modern astronomy. The difference lies in when they place the zero-ayanamsha epoch  –  the year when tropical and sidereal zodiacs were aligned. Lahiri: ~285 CE, Raman: ~397 CE, Fagan-Bradley: ~221 CE.
explanation.bn: Correct. All major ayanamsha systems use the same precession rate from modern astronomy. The difference lies in when they place the zero-ayanamsha epoch  –  the year when tropical and sidereal zodiacs were aligned. Lahiri: ~285 CE, Raman: ~397 CE, Fagan-Bradley: ~221 CE.
explanation.kn: Correct. All major ayanamsha systems use the same precession rate from modern astronomy. The difference lies in when they place the zero-ayanamsha epoch  –  the year when tropical and sidereal zodiacs were aligned. Lahiri: ~285 CE, Raman: ~397 CE, Fagan-Bradley: ~221 CE.
explanation.mr: सही। सभी प्रमुख अयनांश पद्धतियाँ आधुनिक खगोलविज्ञान की वही अयनगति दर प्रयोग करती हैं। अन्तर इसमें है कि वे शून्य-अयनांश युग  –  जब सायन और निरयन राशिचक्र समरेखित थे  –  कब मानती हैं। लाहिरी: ~285 ई., रमण: ~397 ई., फगन-ब्रैडली: ~221 ई.।
explanation.gu: Correct. All major ayanamsha systems use the same precession rate from modern astronomy. The difference lies in when they place the zero-ayanamsha epoch  –  the year when tropical and sidereal zodiacs were aligned. Lahiri: ~285 CE, Raman: ~397 CE, Fagan-Bradley: ~221 CE.
explanation.mai: सही अछि। सभ प्रमुख अयनांश प्रणाली आधुनिक खगोल विज्ञान सँ समान अयनगति दरक उपयोग करैत अछि। अंतर एहि मे अछि जे ओ सभ शून्य-अयनांश युग केँ कहिया रखैत अछि – ओ वर्ष जखन सायन आ निरयन राशिचक्र संरेखित छल। लाहिरी: ~२८५ ईस्वी, रमन: ~३९७ ईस्वी, फेगन-ब्रैडली: ~२२१ ईस्वी।

question.en: If a planet is at 45° tropical longitude and the Lahiri ayanamsha is 24.2°, what is the sidereal longitude?
question.hi: यदि कोई ग्रह 45° सायन देशान्तर पर है और लाहिरी अयनांश 24.2° है, तो निरयन देशान्तर क्या होगा?
question.ta: If a planet is at 45° tropical longitude and the Lahiri ayanamsha is 24.2°, what is the sidereal longitude?
question.te: If a planet is at 45° tropical longitude and the Lahiri ayanamsha is 24.2°, what is the sidereal longitude?
question.bn: If a planet is at 45° tropical longitude and the Lahiri ayanamsha is 24.2°, what is the sidereal longitude?
question.kn: If a planet is at 45° tropical longitude and the Lahiri ayanamsha is 24.2°, what is the sidereal longitude?
question.mr: यदि कोई ग्रह 45° सायन देशान्तर पर है और लाहिरी अयनांश 24.2° है, तो निरयन देशान्तर क्या होगा?
question.gu: If a planet is at 45° tropical longitude and the Lahiri ayanamsha is 24.2°, what is the sidereal longitude?
question.mai: यदि कोनो ग्रह ४५° सायन देशांतर पर अछि आ लाहिरी अयनांश २४.२° अछि, त' निरयन देशांतर की अछि?

explanation.en: Sidereal = Tropical - Ayanamsha = 45° - 24.2° = 20.8°. Since 20.8° falls within 0-30° (Aries range), the planet is at Aries 20.8° in Lahiri sidereal.
explanation.ta: Sidereal = Tropical - Ayanamsha = 45° - 24.2° = 20.8°. Since 20.8° falls within 0-30° (Aries range), the planet is at Aries 20.8° in Lahiri sidereal.
explanation.te: Sidereal = Tropical - Ayanamsha = 45° - 24.2° = 20.8°. Since 20.8° falls within 0-30° (Aries range), the planet is at Aries 20.8° in Lahiri sidereal.
explanation.bn: Sidereal = Tropical - Ayanamsha = 45° - 24.2° = 20.8°. Since 20.8° falls within 0-30° (Aries range), the planet is at Aries 20.8° in Lahiri sidereal.
explanation.kn: Sidereal = Tropical - Ayanamsha = 45° - 24.2° = 20.8°. Since 20.8° falls within 0-30° (Aries range), the planet is at Aries 20.8° in Lahiri sidereal.
explanation.gu: Sidereal = Tropical - Ayanamsha = 45° - 24.2° = 20.8°. Since 20.8° falls within 0-30° (Aries range), the planet is at Aries 20.8° in Lahiri sidereal.
explanation.mai: निरयन = सायन - अयनांश = ४५° - २४.२° = २०.८°। चूंकि २०.८° ०-३०° (मेष राशि क सीमा) क भीतर अबैत अछि, त' ग्रह लाहिरी निरयन मे मेष २०.८° पर अछि।

question.en: Using the same tropical position (45°), what sign would the planet occupy in the Raman system (ayanamsha ~22.4°)?
question.hi: उसी सायन स्थिति (45°) पर, रमण पद्धति (अयनांश ~22.4°) में ग्रह किस राशि में होगा?
question.ta: Using the same tropical position (45°), what sign would the planet occupy in the Raman system (ayanamsha ~22.4°)?
question.te: Using the same tropical position (45°), what sign would the planet occupy in the Raman system (ayanamsha ~22.4°)?
question.bn: Using the same tropical position (45°), what sign would the planet occupy in the Raman system (ayanamsha ~22.4°)?
question.kn: Using the same tropical position (45°), what sign would the planet occupy in the Raman system (ayanamsha ~22.4°)?
question.mr: उसी सायन स्थिति (45°) पर, रमण पद्धति (अयनांश ~22.4°) में ग्रह किस राशि में होगा?
question.gu: Using the same tropical position (45°), what sign would the planet occupy in the Raman system (ayanamsha ~22.4°)?
question.mai: समान सायन स्थिति (४५°) क उपयोग करैत, रमन प्रणाली (अयनांश ~२२.४°) मे ग्रह कोन राशि मे रहत?

explanation.en: Sidereal (Raman) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°. Still within 0-30° = Aries. In this case, both Lahiri and Raman give the same sign. The sign only changes for planets near sign boundaries (within ~2° of a cusp).
explanation.hi: निरयन (रमण) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°। अभी भी 0-30° = मेष में। इस स्थिति में लाहिरी और रमण दोनों एक ही राशि देते हैं। राशि तभी बदलती है जब ग्रह राशि-सन्धि के निकट (~2° के भीतर) हो।
explanation.ta: Sidereal (Raman) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°. Still within 0-30° = Aries. In this case, both Lahiri and Raman give the same sign. The sign only changes for planets near sign boundaries (within ~2° of a cusp).
explanation.te: Sidereal (Raman) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°. Still within 0-30° = Aries. In this case, both Lahiri and Raman give the same sign. The sign only changes for planets near sign boundaries (within ~2° of a cusp).
explanation.bn: Sidereal (Raman) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°. Still within 0-30° = Aries. In this case, both Lahiri and Raman give the same sign. The sign only changes for planets near sign boundaries (within ~2° of a cusp).
explanation.kn: Sidereal (Raman) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°. Still within 0-30° = Aries. In this case, both Lahiri and Raman give the same sign. The sign only changes for planets near sign boundaries (within ~2° of a cusp).
explanation.mr: निरयन (रमण) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°। अभी भी 0-30° = मेष में। इस स्थिति में लाहिरी और रमण दोनों एक ही राशि देते हैं। राशि तभी बदलती है जब ग्रह राशि-सन्धि के निकट (~2° के भीतर) हो।
explanation.gu: Sidereal (Raman) = 45° - 22.4° = 22.6°. Still within 0-30° = Aries. In this case, both Lahiri and Raman give the same sign. The sign only changes for planets near sign boundaries (within ~2° of a cusp).
explanation.mai: निरयन (रमन) = ४५° - २२.४° = २२.६°। अखनो ०-३०° = मेष क भीतर। एहि स्थिति मे, लाहिरी आ रमन दुनू समान राशि दैत अछि। राशि मात्र राशि क सीमाक लग (कोनो कस्प सँ ~२° क भीतर) ग्रहक लेल बदलैत अछि।

question.en: The Indian Government officially uses the Raman ayanamsha for its national calendar (Rashtriya Panchang).
question.hi: भारत सरकार अपने राष्ट्रीय पञ्चाङ्ग (राष्ट्रीय पञ्चाङ्ग) के लिए आधिकारिक रूप से रमण अयनांश का उपयोग करती है।
question.ta: The Indian Government officially uses the Raman ayanamsha for its national calendar (Rashtriya Panchang).
question.te: The Indian Government officially uses the Raman ayanamsha for its national calendar (Rashtriya Panchang).
question.bn: The Indian Government officially uses the Raman ayanamsha for its national calendar (Rashtriya Panchang).
question.kn: The Indian Government officially uses the Raman ayanamsha for its national calendar (Rashtriya Panchang).
question.mr: भारत सरकार अपने राष्ट्रीय पञ्चाङ्ग (राष्ट्रीय पञ्चाङ्ग) के लिए आधिकारिक रूप से रमण अयनांश का उपयोग करती है।
question.gu: The Indian Government officially uses the Raman ayanamsha for its national calendar (Rashtriya Panchang).
question.mai: भारत सरकार अपन राष्ट्रीय पंचांग (राष्ट्रीय पंचांग) क लेल आधिकारिक रूप सँ रमन अयनांशक उपयोग करैत अछि।

explanation.en: False. The Indian Government uses the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha, adopted on the recommendation of the Calendar Reform Committee (1956) chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha. The Rashtriya Panchang published by the India Meteorological Department uses Lahiri.
explanation.hi: गलत। भारत सरकार लाहिरी (चित्रापक्ष) अयनांश का उपयोग करती है, जो भौतिकविद् मेघनाद साहा की अध्यक्षता में पञ्चाङ्ग सुधार समिति (1956) की सिफ़ारिश पर अपनाया गया। भारत मौसम विज्ञान विभाग द्वारा प्रकाशित राष्ट्रीय पञ्चाङ्ग लाहिरी का उपयोग करता है।
explanation.ta: False. The Indian Government uses the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha, adopted on the recommendation of the Calendar Reform Committee (1956) chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha. The Rashtriya Panchang published by the India Meteorological Department uses Lahiri.
explanation.te: False. The Indian Government uses the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha, adopted on the recommendation of the Calendar Reform Committee (1956) chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha. The Rashtriya Panchang published by the India Meteorological Department uses Lahiri.

explanation.kn: False. The Indian Government uses the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha, adopted on the recommendation of the Calendar Reform Committee (1956) chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha. The Rashtriya Panchang published by the India Meteorological Department uses Lahiri.
explanation.mr: गलत। भारत सरकार लाहिरी (चित्रापक्ष) अयनांश का उपयोग करती है, जो भौतिकविद् मेघनाद साहा की अध्यक्षता में पञ्चाङ्ग सुधार समिति (1956) की सिफ़ारिश पर अपनाया गया। भारत मौसम विज्ञान विभाग द्वारा प्रकाशित राष्ट्रीय पञ्चाङ्ग लाहिरी का उपयोग करता है।
explanation.gu: False. The Indian Government uses the Lahiri (Chitrapaksha) ayanamsha, adopted on the recommendation of the Calendar Reform Committee (1956) chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha. The Rashtriya Panchang published by the India Meteorological Department uses Lahiri.
explanation.mai: गलत अछि। भारत सरकार लाहिरी (चित्रपक्ष) अयनांशक उपयोग करैत अछि, जे भौतिक विज्ञानी मेघनाद साहाक अध्यक्षता मे पंचांग सुधार समिति (१९५६) क सिफारिश पर अपनाओल गेल छल। भारत मौसम विज्ञान विभाग द्वारा प्रकाशित राष्ट्रीय पंचांग लाहिरीक उपयोग करैत अछि।

question.en: If someone's Moon is at 29.9° Aries in Lahiri, what sign might the Raman system place it in?
question.hi: यदि किसी की चन्द्रमा लाहिरी में मेष 29.9° पर है, तो रमण पद्धति में वह किस राशि में हो सकती है?
question.ta: If someone's Moon is at 29.9° Aries in Lahiri, what sign might the Raman system place it in?
question.te: If someone's Moon is at 29.9° Aries in Lahiri, what sign might the Raman system place it in?
question.bn: If someone's Moon is at 29.9° Aries in Lahiri, what sign might the Raman system place it in?
question.kn: If someone's Moon is at 29.9° Aries in Lahiri, what sign might the Raman system place it in?
question.mr: यदि किसी की चन्द्रमा लाहिरी में मेष 29.9° पर है, तो रमण पद्धति में वह किस राशि में हो सकती है?
question.gu: If someone's Moon is at 29.9° Aries in Lahiri, what sign might the Raman system place it in?
question.mai: यदि केओक चंद्रमा लाहिरी मे २९.९° मेष पर अछि, त' रमन प्रणाली एकरा कोन राशि मे राखि सकैत अछि?

explanation.en: Raman ayanamsha is ~1.5° less than Lahiri, so sidereal positions are ~1.5° higher. Moon at 29.9° Aries (Lahiri) becomes ~31.4° = 1.4° Taurus in Raman. The sign changes! This illustrates why boundary planets are sensitive to ayanamsha choice.
explanation.hi: रमण अयनांश लाहिरी से ~1.5° कम है, अतः निरयन स्थितियाँ ~1.5° अधिक होती हैं। चन्द्रमा मेष 29.9° (लाहिरी) से ~31.4° = वृषभ 1.4° (रमण) हो जाती है। राशि बदल जाती है! यह दर्शाता है कि राशि-सन्धि के निकट ग्रह अयनांश चयन के प्रति संवेदनशील होते हैं।
explanation.ta: Raman ayanamsha is ~1.5° less than Lahiri, so sidereal positions are ~1.5° higher. Moon at 29.9° Aries (Lahiri) becomes ~31.4° = 1.4° Taurus in Raman. The sign changes! This illustrates why boundary planets are sensitive to ayanamsha choice.
explanation.te: Raman ayanamsha is ~1.5° less than Lahiri, so sidereal positions are ~1.5° higher. Moon at 29.9° Aries (Lahiri) becomes ~31.4° = 1.4° Taurus in Raman. The sign changes! This illustrates why boundary planets are sensitive to ayanamsha choice.
explanation.bn: Raman ayanamsha is ~1.5° less than Lahiri, so sidereal positions are ~1.5° higher. Moon at 29.9° Aries (Lahiri) becomes ~31.4° = 1.4° Taurus in Raman. The sign changes! This illustrates why boundary planets are sensitive to ayanamsha choice.
explanation.kn: Raman ayanamsha is ~1.5° less than Lahiri, so sidereal positions are ~1.5° higher. Moon at 29.9° Aries (Lahiri) becomes ~31.4° = 1.4° Taurus in Raman. The sign changes! This illustrates why boundary planets are sensitive to ayanamsha choice.
explanation.mr: रमण अयनांश लाहिरी से ~1.5° कम है, अतः निरयन स्थितियाँ ~1.5° अधिक होती हैं। चन्द्रमा मेष 29.9° (लाहिरी) से ~31.4° = वृषभ 1.4° (रमण) हो जाती है। राशि बदल जाती है! यह दर्शाता है कि राशि-सन्धि के निकट ग्रह अयनांश चयन के प्रति संवेदनशील होते हैं।
explanation.gu: Raman ayanamsha is ~1.5° less than Lahiri, so sidereal positions are ~1.5° higher. Moon at 29.9° Aries (Lahiri) becomes ~31.4° = 1.4° Taurus in Raman. The sign changes! This illustrates why boundary planets are sensitive to ayanamsha choice.
explanation.mai: रमन अयनांश लाहिरी सँ लगभग १.५° कम अछि, ताहि सँ निरयन स्थिति लगभग १.५° बेसी होइत अछि। चंद्रमा २९.९° मेष (लाहिरी) रमन मे लगभग ३१.४° = १.४° वृषभ बनि जाइत अछि। राशि बदलैत अछि! ई देखाबैत अछि जे किएक सीमावर्ती ग्रह अयनांशक चुनाव पर संवेदनशील होइत अछि।

question.en: Which committee recommended Lahiri as India's official ayanamsha, and in which year?
question.hi: किस समिति ने लाहिरी को भारत का आधिकारिक अयनांश सुझाया, और किस वर्ष?
question.ta: Which committee recommended Lahiri as India's official ayanamsha, and in which year?
question.te: Which committee recommended Lahiri as India's official ayanamsha, and in which year?
question.bn: Which committee recommended Lahiri as India's official ayanamsha, and in which year?
question.kn: Which committee recommended Lahiri as India's official ayanamsha, and in which year?
question.mr: किस समिति ने लाहिरी को भारत का आधिकारिक अयनांश सुझाया, और किस वर्ष?
question.gu: Which committee recommended Lahiri as India's official ayanamsha, and in which year?
question.mai: कोन समिति भारतक आधिकारिक अयनांशक रूप मे लाहिरीक सिफारिश केलक, आ कोन वर्ष मे?

explanation.en: The Calendar Reform Committee, chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha and established by the Indian Government's Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) in 1952, published its report in 1955. The Lahiri ayanamsha was officially adopted in 1956.
explanation.hi: पञ्चाङ्ग सुधार समिति, जिसकी अध्यक्षता भौतिकविद् मेघनाद साहा ने की और जो 1952 में भारत सरकार की वैज्ञानिक एवं औद्योगिक अनुसन्धान परिषद् (CSIR) द्वारा स्थापित हुई, ने 1955 में अपनी रिपोर्ट प्रकाशित की। लाहिरी अयनांश 1956 में आधिकारिक रूप से अपनाया गया।
explanation.ta: The Calendar Reform Committee, chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha and established by the Indian Government's Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) in 1952, published its report in 1955. The Lahiri ayanamsha was officially adopted in 1956.
explanation.te: The Calendar Reform Committee, chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha and established by the Indian Government's Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) in 1952, published its report in 1955. The Lahiri ayanamsha was officially adopted in 1956.
explanation.bn: The Calendar Reform Committee, chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha and established by the Indian Government's Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) in 1952, published its report in 1955. The Lahiri ayanamsha was officially adopted in 1956.
explanation.kn: The Calendar Reform Committee, chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha and established by the Indian Government's Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) in 1952, published its report in 1955. The Lahiri ayanamsha was officially adopted in 1956.
explanation.mr: पञ्चाङ्ग सुधार समिति, जिसकी अध्यक्षता भौतिकविद् मेघनाद साहा ने की और जो 1952 में भारत सरकार की वैज्ञानिक एवं औद्योगिक अनुसन्धान परिषद् (CSIR) द्वारा स्थापित हुई, ने 1955 में अपनी रिपोर्ट प्रकाशित की। लाहिरी अयनांश 1956 में आधिकारिक रूप से अपनाया गया।
explanation.gu: The Calendar Reform Committee, chaired by physicist Meghnad Saha and established by the Indian Government's Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) in 1952, published its report in 1955. The Lahiri ayanamsha was officially adopted in 1956.
explanation.mai: भौतिक विज्ञानी मेघनाद साहाक अध्यक्षता मे आ भारतीय सरकारक वैज्ञानिक आ औद्योगिक अनुसंधान परिषद (सीएसआईआर) द्वारा १९५२ मे स्थापित पंचांग सुधार समिति, अपन रिपोर्ट १९५५ मे प्रकाशित केलक। लाहिरी अयनांश आधिकारिक रूप सँ १९५६ मे अपनाओल गेल छल।

questions.classicalRef: Report of the Calendar Reform Committee, CSIR, 1955
